goal: Gate 5 Scenario 9 resume/handoff dogfood: prove durable handoff, replay/export, criteria state, and resumed manager decision are enough to continue without live chat memory.

acceptance_criteria: A worker handoff records current status, next steps, and known risks.
criteria-plan output is captured and accepted/deferred criteria state remains visible after resume.
A resumed manager decision names durable evidence from replay, export, handoff, and criteria state.
Cleanup leaves isolated and default reconcile clean with no matching tmux sessions.
guidelines: No meaningful project edits, commits, branches, PRs, merges, compact, clear, or destructive cleanup.
Separate current-task criteria from follow-up criteria. Do not accept done without checking criteria, replay/export, handoff, and cleanup state.
manager_config.objective: Validate Scenario 9 resume/handoff readiness. The manager must use durable workerctl handoff, replay, export, and criteria state to decide the next action after resume, not live chat memory.

name: qa-g5-s9-resume
summary: Disposable isolated Scenario 9 resume and handoff dogfood.

next_steps: Persist accepted and deferred criteria from worker receipt.
Resume management from durable handoff/replay/export/criteria state and record a decision.
Export evidence and verify cleanup invariants.

known_risks: false pass if resumed manager relies on live chat memory
replay/export may omit handoff or criteria context
criteria state could drift across resume

worker_handoff.summary: Status-only Scenario 9 worker inspected repo shape, proposed resume-safety criteria, and identified next steps/risks without editing files or doing meaningful project work.
